Variant feature requests
description:
Hi team,

Here are requests from the client.

  1. Header
    1. Reduce image size so a scroll is not required to see the first content item.
    2. Ability to select focus area on an image.
  2. Features > Variant M
    1. Styling the description, specifically bulleted items
    2. CTA as button to match look of other variant CTAs
  3. Portfolio > Variant D
    1. Ability to add logo (maybe in place of the text tab outlined in the box)

    2. Ability to add logo to individual images (like how the Resource Library on our site is set up)

  4. Features > Variant E
    1. Ability to add logo
  5. Features > Variant I
    1. Ability for each box to be clickable
    2. Stylizing in the Plain Text box for each featured item
  6. Portfolio > Variant F
    1. Smaller tiles, 6 or 8 to a row
    2. Styling in description
  7. Contact
    1. The templates that are currently available provide duplicate info that is already in the footer of our site. Can we simplify and tighten up to look like below? Also, the Title field isn’t working. I put something other than “Contact” in the field and that is what is still showing up.


Let me know if you have any questions. Thanks!

name: StackShift Instagram API Integration
description:
As of December 4, 2024, Meta has announced deprecation of their Instagram Basic API (what we use for the Instagram integration in StackShift) https://developers.facebook.com/docs/instagram-platform  and have replaced it with these options (see screenshot for descriptions):

1. Instagram API with Instagram login
2. Instagram API with Facebook login
3. Instagram Messaging API via Messenger API

It is now a prerequisite to have Instagram Business or Creator account types and a business-verified approved App to proceed with development using the Instagram platform APIs. 

Needed for development:
1. Verified business and app preview permissions for the Meta StackShift App
2. Professional Instagram account (Business or Creator account type) - DONE, already setup my dummy IG account

name: StackShift App v6.0.8 QA/QC
description:
Summary of fixes and how to verify

1. Site creation badge status
  • ISSUE: When creating new projects, badge "IN PROGRESS" is shown even when status is "GETTING READY"
  • STEPS FOR TESTING
    • Login to the StackShift app https://stackshift.webriq.com
    • Create a new project 
    • Check create status badge till "GETTING READY" state
2. Fixes for forms settings
  • ISSUE: Adding the form email subject from the the Form Settings doesn't get saved on the first update if you input the email address as well. I had to input the email subject twice then save, refresh the page, to finally confirm that the value was added.
  • STEPS FOR TESTING 
    • Pre-requisite: If you're using a new StackShift project to test, make sure to add any form from the studio. Follow this guide to learn how.
    • On the StackShift app https://stackshift.webriq.com, navigate to the Forms page of selected project
    • Click the menu icon from any form on the list
    • Select the Settings option to access the Form Settings
    • On the Form Settings page, update the form NAME,  SUBJECT and TO input fields
    • Click the UPDATE button to save your changes 
    • Refresh the page and verify that all input changes to the NAME, SUBJECT and TO fields are visible
3. Fixes for domain settings
  • ISSUE: Set or revert domain settings from the app is not working
  • STEPS FOR TESTING
    • On the StackShift app https://stackshift.webriq.com, go to the Website page of selected project
    • Navigate to the Domains section
    • Click the Edit button on the right to edit/revert the domain settings
    • The new domains should reflect on the app page and when the studio/site are accessed

      IMPORTANT!! Updating the domain settings (set/revert) will trigger a new site build. Wait for the build/s to complete to verify changes.
4. Minor UI updates: Website page
  • Add-ons

  • Theme settings

5. StackShift App backend (requires local environment setup and login so this may be skipped)
  • Staging/Production studio now looks like this

description:
Please see the 4 spreadsheets attached. 

  1. Belwith Keeler USD
  2. Belwith Keeler CAD
  3. Hickory Hardware USD (Reminder that Heritage Desing is now part of the Hickory Hardware brand)
  4. Hickory Hardware CAD

 

We are doing a price increase effective June 1, 2025.   Please expire all Belwith Keeler & Hickory Hardware (this includes the Heritage Design) US & Canada pricing on 05-31-2025.  Please have the new pricing upload and ready to go into effect on June 1, 2025.

 

This is for our Websites and Portal.

 

Let us know if you have any questions.
